arts.ttl: Arsenal believe ‘absolutely sensational’ Premier League star is heading to Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal feel one of their top transfer targets will join Liverpool if he leaves his current club this summer. The Gunners are ready to make additions to their squad after this season with Mikel Arteta’s side once again likely to fail in their quest to win the Premier League title. Journalist Fabrizio Romano has already […] The post Arsenal believe ‘absolutely sensational’ Premier League star is heading to Liverpool appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal hold talks for huge Hugo Ekitike transfer to beat Man United and Liverpool to deal
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly one of three teams who have held talks over signing Eintracht Frankfurt striker Hugo Ekitike in the summer transfer window. In an attempt to prevent being caught short for a striker next season, it is understood that Arsenal will be making a centre-forward a priority in the summer.

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available vs Everton as five ruled out after Gabriel injury blow
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side are 12 points behind Liverpool in the Premier League table going into their trip to Merseyside. Arsenal will be without some key players when they face Everton in the Premier League this weekend.

arts.ttl: 'I'll never say sorry!' - Four players have fallen out with Mikel Arteta at Arsenal - football.london
arts.sum: So, with that being said, football.london has looked at what players have fallen out with Arteta at Arsenal. Ozil got off to a promising start under Arteta, starting each of the new Arsenal boss' first 10 games in the Premier League.
